title: Ben Stokes set to be left out of England squad for second New Zealand Test

title: Two men jailed for violence at protest over police treatment of Henry Nowak
description: Leon O’Leary threw a smoke grenade and Connor Bishop a traffic cone at officers during disturbance in Southampton
content:
Two men who threw a smoke grenade and traffic cone at police during the violence in Southampton that followed the sentencing of Henry Nowak’s killer have been jailed.
Leon O’Leary, 41, from Basingstoke, Hampshire, was sentenced to three years and one... [2772 chars]

title: Man, 30, charged with attempted murder over Belfast knife attack
description: Police say the man, who has also been charged with threats to kill, will appear in court on Wednesday.

title: Cardiff woman with acute myeloid leukaemia says leaving twin is 'unthinkable'
description: Caitlin Leggett is fundraising £500,000 to pursue overseas treatment for leukaemia after the cancer returned.
content:
A woman given six months to live after her leukaemia returned says the thought of leaving her identical twin sister alone is "unthinkable".
Caitlin Leggett, 24, from Cardiff, was diagnosed with acute myeloid leukaemia (AML) - an aggressive cancer of ... [3854 chars]

title: David Sullivan banned from contact with West Ham women's and youth teams since 2023
description: The decision followed a safeguarding investigation opened by the the Football Association.
content:
West Ham co-owner David Sullivan has been banned from having contact with the club's women's and youth teams for the last three years because of safeguarding concerns.
